name: regulatory-webhook
description: MEOK AI Labs — Monitor regulatory changes. Subscribe to updates. Get notified when laws change.

tools.name: subscribe
tools.description: Subscribe to regulatory update notifications for specific frameworks.

tools.name: get_recent_changes
tools.description: Get recent regulatory changes for specified frameworks.

tools.name: check_for_updates
tools.description: Check if monitored frameworks have recent updates.

tools.name: register_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook for regulatory notifications.

tools.name: trigger_webhook
tools.description: Manually trigger a webhook with payload.

tools.name: get_framework_newsletter_summary
tools.description: Get a newsletter-ready summary of recent regulatory changes.
